dict.string: ResidenceConnect uses Bluetooth to discover nearby TTLock devices and control supported smart locks.
ResidenceConnect uses Bluetooth to communicate with supported TTLock smart locks.
ResidenceConnect uses your location to show your current position for location sharing and related resident features.
ResidenceConnect uses your location to provide location-based features and smart access when required, even when transitioning between app states.
ResidenceConnect uses your location to provide location-based features and smart access when required.
ResidenceConnect uses the microphone for voice input when creating maintenance requests.
ResidenceConnect uses speech recognition to convert your voice into text for voice input features.
ResidenceConnect uses the camera to capture profile photos and KYC documents.
ResidenceConnect uses your photo library so you can upload community images and resident documents.
ResidenceConnect may save selected media as part of document and image workflows.
